posts.title: Ron DeSantis hints at a 2028 presidential run, saying that he can preserve the Trump voter base.

twitter.content:
🚨 NOW: Ron DeSantis is signaling a possible 2028 run, saying President Trump built a powerful voter base but Republicans must deliver results to keep it.

He pointed to Florida’s 2022 landslide win as proof conservative leadership can secure victories.

posts.author: votedforthe45th
posts.title: Diesel engines for everyone

link_metadata.description: WASHINGTON, D.C.—Flanked by EPA administrator Lee Zeldin in the Roosevelt Room, President Donald Trump announced that his administration has formally rescinded a 2009 Obama-era finding that greenhouse gases like carbon dioxide endanger public health. That finding led to a slate of federal climate regulations targeting gas-powered vehicles, including former president Joe Biden’s top-down effort to force Americans to buy more electric cars.
link_metadata.title: ‘This Is About As Big as It Gets’: Trump Formally Guts Obama-Era Climate Finding That Allowed Feds To Regulate Emissions
